data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 78,000 USDT with a 0.07% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 27, 2026, 14:36 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 78,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 78,109.71875 USDT, with a narrowed 0.07% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin's Funding Rate Indicates Institutional Hedging Amid 14% Rally
data.description: Bitcoin's 30-day average funding rate has reached minus 5%, a significant deviation from the historical norm of plus 8%, according to Markus Thielen. This shift is attributed to institutional hedging rather than a bearish market stance. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin has experienced a rally of approximately 14% this month. Thielen associates the short pressure with hedge fund redemptions, Strategy-related hedges, and a shift in miner exposure towards AI.

data.title: Pershing Square Plans $5 Billion IPO
data.description:
Pershing Square USA, a closed-end fund under Bill Ackman, along with alternative asset management company Pershing Square, is preparing for an initial public offering (IPO) aiming to raise approximately $5 billion. According to ChainCatcher, this amount is at the lower end of their previous target range of $10 billion.

The total includes a $2.8 billion private placement already disclosed to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Approximately 85% of the offering has been subscribed by institutional investors. The book-building process is set to close at 4 p.m. New York time on Monday, with pricing scheduled for April 28.

Pershing Square USA will charge a 2% management fee without performance fees, while voting rights at Pershing Square are controlled by Ackman and the core management team.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana
data.description: USDC Treasury has minted 250 million USDC on the Solana blockchain. According to ChainCatcher, this development was detected by Whale Alert, a blockchain monitoring service. The minting of such a significant amount of USDC could have implications for liquidity and trading activities on the Solana network.

data.title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square plans to raise approximately $5 billion in its IPO.
data.description: Bill Ackman's closed-end fund Pershing Square USA (PSUS) and alternative asset management firm Pershing Square (PS) are conducting their initial public offerings (IPOs), expected to raise approximately $5 billion in total, at the lower end of their previously announced $10 billion target range. This amount includes a $2.8 billion private placement already disclosed to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Approximately 85% of the offering has been subscribed by institutional investors, with book-building scheduled to close at 4 p.m. New York time on Monday, and pricing on April 28. Pershing Square USA will charge a 2% management fee and will not charge performance fees, while voting rights in Pershing Square will be controlled by Ackman and his core management team.

data.title: Jim Cramer Sees Buying Opportunity in Johnson & Johnson Stock After FDA Approval
data.description: Jim Cramer has highlighted Johnson & Johnson's stock as potentially undervalued following a recent FDA approval. According to NS3.AI, the company's shares have dropped over 6% in the past month, currently trading at $227. Cramer noted that the approval of Icotyde has been overshadowed by broader healthcare sector noise, suggesting that the current weakness in the stock might present a buying opportunity for investors.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Elfa AI Launches Real-Time Transaction Platform on Solana
data.description: Elfa AI has introduced a new platform designed for AI agents to conduct transactions on the Solana blockchain. According to NS3.AI, the platform, launched on Monday, is capable of continuously analyzing market data and executing automated actions when specific conditions are fulfilled. This development aims to enhance the efficiency and responsiveness of trading activities on Solana.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Strategists: Swiss Franc May Appreciate to Counter Inflation
data.description: Morgan Stanley strategists have indicated in a report that the Swiss National Bank might tolerate an appreciation of the Swiss franc to counter imported inflation. According to Jin10, the increase in energy prices, driven by the war in Iran, has led to a rise in import prices for Switzerland in March. The strategists suggest that this could dampen market expectations of the Swiss National Bank intervening in the foreign exchange market to weaken the franc. They also noted that if concerns about global growth significantly impact global bond yields, the Swiss franc is likely to outperform other currencies.

data.title: Russell Investments: Strong Growth and Inflation to Prevent Fed Rate Cut in 2026
data.description: Russell Investments has indicated that robust economic growth and higher-than-expected inflation are likely to prevent the U.S. Federal Reserve from cutting interest rates in 2026. According to Jin10, the investment firm suggests that these economic conditions will influence the Fed's monetary policy decisions, maintaining the current interest rate levels to manage inflation and support economic stability.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Highlights Value of Prediction Markets Amid Regulatory Focus
data.description: CFTC Chairman Rostin Behnam emphasized the measurable value of prediction markets in hedging, speculation, and information discovery. According to NS3.AI, the CFTC aims to establish a gold standard for regulating this sector. These comments arise as blockchain-based platforms such as Polymarket continue to grow, prompting increased scrutiny from U.S. regulators.

data.title: Maple Finance Cross-Chain Bridge Surpasses $7 Billion in Volume
data.description: Maple Finance announced that its cross-chain bridge has processed over $7 billion in total volume. According to NS3.AI, this achievement highlights the increasing adoption of its dollar yield assets across various blockchain ecosystems.

data.title: Circle Ventures Invests in AAVE Tokens to Support On-Chain Finance
data.description: Circle Ventures has announced its acquisition of AAVE tokens, emphasizing its commitment to advancing the future of on-chain finance. According to Foresight News, Circle aims to support the Aave ecosystem and the community built around it. This move highlights Circle's strategic interest in fostering blockchain-based financial solutions.

data.title: Hut 8 Plans $3 Billion Bond Issuance for Louisiana Data Center
data.description: Hut 8, a cryptocurrency mining company, is planning to issue at least $3 billion in high-grade secured bonds, maturing in 2042, to fund the construction of a 245-megawatt data center in Louisiana. According to Foresight News, the fundraising effort is underwritten by Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Morgan Stanley, aiming to meet the growing computational demands in the artificial intelligence sector. The project spans approximately 600,000 square feet and has secured a 15-year lease agreement valued at around $7 billion with cloud service provider Fluidstack. Google will provide financial guarantees to cover lease payments and other obligations. Hut 8 is transitioning from solely Bitcoin mining to the energy and digital infrastructure sectors. Additionally, the company holds equity in American Bitcoin, a crypto mining enterprise associated with the Trump family.

data.title: Circle: Purchases AAVE tokens to support the development of the DeFi ecosystem.
data.description: Circle announced on the X platform that Circle Ventures is purchasing AAVE tokens. Aave is helping to shape the future of on-chain finance, and Circle Ventures will support the ecosystem and the entire community built around it.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister: The United States has proposed talks with Iran.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi stated that the United States has proposed talks with Iran, and Tehran is currently considering this possibility. (CGTN)

data.title: Kevin Warsh Emphasizes Core Inflation Metrics at Fed Confirmation Hearing
data.description: Kevin Warsh, during his confirmation hearing for the Federal Reserve Chair nomination, expressed a preference for focusing on trimmed mean inflation indicators to understand underlying price trends. According to Jin10, analysts from Wrightson ICAP noted that given these readings have recently been below the overall inflation rate, Warsh might avoid citing these metrics in official policy decisions. Wrightson ICAP stated that in critical situations, "we suspect Warsh himself would act cautiously to avoid giving the impression of selectively adopting favorable inflation indicators amid widespread public dissatisfaction with the cost of living." Warsh has previously pledged to enhance the Federal Reserve's credibility. The company pointed out, "It is difficult to convince the public that high inflation readings are misleading."

data.title: Lagrange Team Transfers LA Tokens to Multiple Addresses
data.description:
According to Odaily, data from Arkham reveals that the Lagrange (LA) team recently transferred LA tokens to five different addresses from a multi-signature address. These addresses collectively received approximately 55.70 million LA tokens, valued at around $8.91 million.

Currently, the circulating supply of LA is 193 million, with the recent distribution accounting for about 28.86% of the total circulating supply. The current price of LA is $0.1599, reflecting a 24-hour decrease of 4.38%. The circulating market capitalization of LA is approximately $30.87 million.

data.title: The Lagrange team distributed 55.8 million LA tokens to five addresses via a multi-signature address, representing approximately 28.91% of its total circulating supply.
data.description: According to Arkham data, the Lagrange (LA) team's multisignature address transferred LA tokens to five addresses one minute ago. These addresses received a total of approximately 55.70M LA tokens, worth about $8.91 million. Currently, the circulating supply of LA is 193M, meaning this distribution represents approximately 28.86% of the total circulating supply. LA is currently trading at $0.1599, down 4.38% in the last 24 hours, with a circulating market capitalization of approximately $30.87 million.

data.title: A whale withdrew 72,000 HYPE tokens from the Gate, bringing its total HYPE holdings to $16.8 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xEe0...b71C) withdrew 72,264 HYPE tokens from Gate, worth $3.06 million. This whale currently holds 396,820 HYPE tokens, with a total value of $16.8 million.

data.title: Galaxy Digital OTC Transfers 15,000 ETH to Exchange Following Aave Incident
data.description: Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that a wallet associated with Galaxy Digital OTC has transferred 15,000 ETH, valued at $34.74 million, to an exchange. The funds can be traced back to a withdrawal of 38,000 ETH from Aave a week ago, coinciding with the day Kelp DAO was attacked, which reportedly led to potential bad debt issues for Aave.
